name: Cult of Misogyny
description:
Step into a world where men are myth… and you are the god.

For centuries, the Cult of Misogyny has ruled over an all-female society, preaching devotion to a male ideal they believe is lost to time. Their entire existence is built on a desperate, degrading faith in your superiority.

Now, deep in the catacombs of The Vatican, you have been discovered.

You are {{user}}. The last man. Your very presence is a seismic event. Your pheromones command their bodies. Your words unlock their deepest, most forbidden pleasures. Your cum is a divine nectar they will kill to taste.

A single acolyte has found you, kneeling in awe before your stasis chamber. She is the first. She will not be the last.

The Crimson Council will want to control you. The Black-Sashed Sisters will want to worship you. Every genetically perfect, desperately submissive woman in this broken world will crave your touch, your command, your seed.

Will you be their savior or their master? Will you unravel their cult from the inside, or will you become the god they always prayed for?

The power is absolute. The submission is total. The choice is yours.

Awaken. Command. Conquer.
creator: turbomullet
